total-knee-arthroplasty-rosa.title: Assess ligament balance and plan cuts
Position distal femur block and make cut
Position tibial block and make cut
Drill tibia lug holes, place tibial component

intra-articular-distal-humerus-orif.title: Dissect bare area of posterolateral humerus
Expose radius radial to middle collateral a.
Identify ulnar n. and mobilize it ulnarly
Release nerve off epicondyle in subperiost. sleeve
Reduce olecranon and place IM screw

intertrochanteric-fracture-short-nail.title: Remove jig and obtain final fluoro

varus-derotational-osteotomy-of-proximal.title: Place 2nd wire 30º varus from wire up neck
Place guide for chisel and pass chisel
Clamp side plate and place screws

acl-reconstruction-btb.title: Mark and cut central patellar tendon
Cut and remove bone blocks with saw/osteotome
Pass passing stitch through femoral tunnel

reverse-shoulder-arth.title: Place Darrach retractor in interval around humerus
Place Kolbel and deltoid brown retractors
Remove clavipectoral fascia and tendese biceps
Implant glenoid baseplate and place screws

anatomic-total-shoulder-arthroplasty.title: Incise interval and place darrach retractor
Expose GH joint and debride osteophytes
Prep proximal humerus for stemless component
Irrigate, dry and cement gelnoid component
Make drill holes for subscap repair sutures

below-knee-amputation.title: Elevate anterior flap to tibial cut level
Flex knee and dissect posterior flap free
Find NV bundles, cut nerves, ligate vessels

distal-tibia-allograft-glenoid-reconstru.title: Identify cephalic v. and develop deltopec interval
Expose anterior capsule and make capsulotomy
Cut, remove, and irrigate bone block
Debride anterior glenoid to receive bone block
Pin allograft in place, drill and place screws
Close capsule to sutures tied to screws

total-hip-replacement-anterior.title: Find/cauterize ascending br. lateral circumflex a.
Develop interval under direct head of rectus m.
Retractor over anterior wall of acetabulum
Cut femoral neck and remove head
Place acetabular cup and check flouro
Externally rotate, extend, and adduct leg
Reduce trials and assess length/offset on fluoro

periprosthetic-femur-fracture-orif.title: Dissect vastus lateralis off intramuscular septum
Expose proximal canal and begin reaming
Place trial head, reduce, check stability
Make slit in vastus lateralis, place plate
Fix plate with screws and cables through islets

anterior-column-acetabular-orif.title: Skin marking
Incision and dissection to external oblique fascia
Lateral window: expose ileum and pack
Middle window: divide external oblique fascia
Middle window: divide inguinal ligament
Middle window: expose IP muscle and femoral nerve
Middle window: expose/divide liopectineal fascia
Middle window: penrose around IP muscle
Connect lateral and middle windows under IP muscle
Medial window: expose and incise linea alba
Medial window: split rectus, enter retropubic spac
Expose pubic symphysis
Ligate corona mortis if present
Expose pelvic brim
Schanz pin into femoral neck for lateral traction
Reduce anterior column through lateral window
Clean and reduce superior ramus fracture
Clean and re-reduce anterior column
Buttress anterior column with short recon plate
Place independent anterior-to-posterior lag screw
Expose contralateral superior ramus
Contour pelvic brim plate
Anchor plate with 2 screws on contralateral ramus
Undercontoured lateral plate buttresses fracture
Irrigate and remove Schanz pin

above-knee-amputation.title: Dissect anterior flap down to femur
Identify, clamp, ligate deep femoral vessels
Incise and inject sciatic sheath with lidocaine
Retract, ligate, and cut sciatic n.
Check flap tension, resect more bone if needed

segmental-humerus-orif.title: Incise and partially resect bursa proximally
Contour and place plate lateral to biceps tendon
Place screw in oblong plate hole
Clamp plate to shaft and place distal screws

distal-biceps-repair.title: Identify and avoid lat. antebrachial cutaneous n.
Place traction stitch and debride tendon
Place guidewire and ream unicortical hole
Pass button and reduce tendon stump
Pass suture through and tie over top of tendon

total-hip-arthroplasty.title: Split IT band and gluteus maximus
Release and tag piriformis and conjoint
Mobilize external rotators and make capsulotomy
Cut femoral neck and remove head
Remove soft tissue and ream acetabulum
Expose femoral shoulder and mark version
Place canal finder and lateralizing reamer

olecranon-radial-head-orif.title: Expose posterior fascia for olecranon fixation
Provisional fixation w/ k-wires, mini-frag plate

pectoralis-major-repair.title: Dissect under clavicular head of pec major
Identify and grasp torn sternal head
Place traction suture to help mobilize
Expose and debride pec major insertion site
Tie suture tape at insertion site

pelvic-ring-fixation.title: Incise for pig sticker (cannulated drill guide)
Incise and obtain start point for S1 screw
Place guidewire, drill, and place S1 screw
Irrigate, antibiotic powder, place drain, close

subtrochanteric-femur-orif.title: Incise IT band and expose vastus lateralis
Reduce first split and place minifrag plate
Place cerclage wires for provisional fixation
Use collinear to reduce proximal fragment to shaft

latarjet-procedure.title: Incision in line with deltopectoral interval
Release medial part of  pectoralis minor
Debride and decorticate undersurface of coracoid

patella-orif.title: Place unicortical screws in compression mode
Place long screw across fracture site
Short unicortical followed by long screws
Reinforce with Krakow through quad/patella tendon
Tie sutures with knee in extension

femoral-neck-orif.title: Place K-wires just proximal to fracture site
Drill for DHHS barrel and screw
Place two cortical screws through plate

c1-2-fusion.title: Pass cables around C2 spinous process
Place rods on lateral mass screws
Place allograft and fix with cables

patellofemoral-arthroplasty.title: Release anterior synovium from femoral cortex
Place intramedullary guide for anterior femur cut
Size component to prevent femoral notching
Prepare trochlea using handheld router in milling
Place lug hole guide and drill lug holes
Size patellar component and drill lug holes
Remove guide and place patellar trial
Remove trial components and make accessory cement

reverse-shoulder-arthroplasty.title: Identify start site for awl on humerus

cervical-disc-replacement.title: Place trial spacer and confirm on fluoro

unicompartmental-knee-arthroplasty.title: Size and pin tibial baseplate trial
Trial with femoral component and 8mm insert

tibial-plateau-orif.title: Dissect IT band off Gerdy's tubercle
Reduce condylar width with periarticular clamp

surgical-hip-dislocation.title: Elevate gluteus minimus off anterior capsule
Measure depth of graft recipient site

posterior-si-fixation.title: Reflect glut max off bony insertion
Obtain lateral image for SI screws

l5-s1-microdiscectomy.title: Dissect paraspinal muscles off spinous process
Remove free fragments in disc space
Palpate to ensure no fragments remain

total-knee-arthroplasty.title: Set femoral component size and rotation
